calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2010 Continued To Aug-27-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Adriana Dydell, Esq. appeared for plaintiff First National Bank of Northern California, a national bank.
Randy Brugioni, Senior Vice President for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Lynch Investments, LLC, a California limited liability company, Peter Lynch, an individual or Katherine Lehmann, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant Lynch Investments on February 8, 2010; against defendant Peter Lynch on February 22, 2010 and against defendant Katherine Lehmann on January 27, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 26, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of PlaintiffFirst National Bank of Northern California, and against the Defaulted Defendant Lynch Investments, LLC, Peter Lynch and Katherine Lehmann as follows:

Damages/Principal - $252,560.29.
Prejudgment Interest - $36,765.25.
Attorney's Fees - $2,877.36.
Costs - $450.99, for a total judgment as to Lynch Investments, LLC of $292,653.89.

Damages/Principal - $681,045.59.
Prejudgment Interest - $63,737.95.
Attorney's Fees - $7,759.78.
Costs - $806.57, for a total judgment as to Peter Lynch of $753,349.89.

Damages/Principal - $15,060.29.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,668.52.
Attorney's Fees - $171.86.
Costs - $215.53, for a total judgment as to Katherine Lehmann of $17,116.20.

Judgement was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-10-2010 Continued To Jul-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
